title: crataegus altaica
intro: Crataegus altaica, also known as the Siberian hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to eastern Siberia. The plant is rich in bioflavonoids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties that help in lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Crataegus altaica include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving circulation, and acting as an antioxidant to protect the body from free radicals. Crataegus altaica can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
